source.title: Integrated Information Theory: Foundations of Conscious Existence
source.path: Information-Theory/Integrated Information Theory_ Foundations of Conscious Existence.pdf

nodes.name: Physical Substrate
nodes.label: S
nodes.description: Finite set of physical units (neurons or logic units) that instantiate the candidate system.

nodes.name: Current State
nodes.label: s_0
nodes.description: Current binary microstate over substrate units.

nodes.name: Transition Probability Matrix
nodes.label: P
nodes.description: Markovian transition dynamics P(s_{t+1}|s_t).

nodes.name: Network Topology
nodes.label: Topology
nodes.description: Connectivity class: grid, modular, feedforward, or random.

nodes.name: Candidate Partition
nodes.label: Partition
nodes.description: Candidate cut of S used to evaluate reducibility.

nodes.name: Minimum Information Partition
nodes.label: MIP
nodes.description: Partition that minimizes information-preserving causal power.

nodes.name: Integration Measure
nodes.label: Phi
nodes.description: Irreducibility scalar phi >= 0 defined at the MIP.

nodes.name: Unfolding Operator
nodes.label: F
nodes.description: Operator that maps physical state and dynamics into the cause-effect structure.

nodes.name: Cause-Effect Structure
nodes.label: Omega
nodes.description: High-dimensional lattice/polytope of distinctions and relations.

nodes.name: Experience
nodes.label: E
nodes.description: Phenomenal description of the same entity as Omega.

nodes.name: Intrinsicality Axiom
nodes.label: Axiom: Intrinsicality
nodes.description: Experience exists for itself.

nodes.name: Information Axiom
nodes.label: Axiom: Information
nodes.description: Experience is specific and differentiates alternatives.

nodes.name: Integration Axiom
nodes.label: Axiom: Integration
nodes.description: Experience is unified and irreducible.

nodes.name: Composition Axiom
nodes.label: Axiom: Composition
nodes.description: Experience has parts and structure.

nodes.name: Exclusion Axiom
nodes.label: Axiom: Exclusion
nodes.description: Experience is definite and has boundaries.

nodes.name: Intrinsicality Postulate
nodes.label: Postulate: Intrinsicality
nodes.description: Mechanism has intrinsic cause-effect power.

nodes.name: Information Postulate
nodes.label: Postulate: Information
nodes.description: Mechanism specifies a selective cause-effect repertoire.

nodes.name: Integration Postulate
nodes.label: Postulate: Integration
nodes.description: Mechanism must be irreducible (Phi > 0) to exist intrinsically.

nodes.name: Composition Postulate
nodes.label: Postulate: Composition
nodes.description: Mechanism has compositional causal structure.

nodes.name: Exclusion Postulate
nodes.label: Postulate: Exclusion
nodes.description: Only maximally irreducible conceptual structure (MICS) is admitted.

nodes.name: Intrinsic Entity
nodes.label: Intrinsic Entity
nodes.description: Boolean classifier for crossing Phi > 0 divide.

nodes.name: Consciousness Classifier
nodes.label: Conscious
nodes.description: Boolean classifier Phi > consciousness threshold.

nodes.name: Phi Distinctions
nodes.label: Phi_d
nodes.description: Sum of distinction-level irreducibility terms.

nodes.name: Phi Relations
nodes.label: Phi_r
nodes.description: Sum of relation-level irreducibility terms.

nodes.name: Total Phi
nodes.label: Phi_total
nodes.description: Total integrated information from distinctions and relations.

nodes.name: Consciousness Threshold
nodes.label: theta_c
nodes.description: Decision boundary for conscious classification.

nodes.name: MICS Set
nodes.label: I
nodes.description: Set of complexes that locally maximize Phi.

nodes.name: Unfolding Complexity
nodes.label: O(2^|S|)
nodes.description: Complexity class of exhaustive unfolding over the power set.

nodes.name: Von Neumann Architecture
nodes.label: Von Neumann
nodes.description: Digital modular architecture with coarse separability.

nodes.name: Great Divide Boundary
nodes.label: Phi = 0 Boundary
nodes.description: Ontological boundary separating intrinsic entities from aggregates.

nodes.name: Feedback Loops
nodes.label: Feedback
nodes.description: Presence of recurrent bidirectional pathways supporting integration.

nodes.name: Bidirectional Connectivity
nodes.label: Bidirectionality
nodes.description: Fraction of reciprocal connections in the network.

edges.mechanism: Substrate composition sets available partitions and candidate complexes.
Current microstate changes distinction/relation repertoires entering Phi.
Transition dynamics define causal repertoires and partition information loss.
Connectivity class bounds achievable irreducibility.
MIP is selected by minimizing loss over candidate partitions.
Phi is the value at the minimum information partition.
Unfolding receives substrate units as mechanism candidates.
Unfolding conditions distinctions on current state.
Only irreducible concepts persist in unfolded structure.
Operator maps mechanisms to the cause-effect lattice.
Phenomenology is identified with the unfolded structure.
Identity is bidirectional; changing one changes the other.
Crossing Phi>0 marks intrinsic existence.
Consciousness classification depends on thresholded Phi.
Subjective intrinsicality maps to intrinsic causal power.
Phenomenal specificity maps to selective repertoires.
Unity maps to irreducibility requirement Phi>0.
Structured experience maps to compositional mechanism.
Definiteness maps to maximal irreducible complex selection.
Intrinsic causal power contributes to admissible distinctions.
Specific repertoires define shape of distinctions.
Only irreducible structures survive partition cuts.
Compositional relations define lattice edges.
MICS selection excludes non-maximal overlapping structures.
Experience must exist for itself.
Experience has specific differentiated content.
Experience is unified and not decomposable.
Experience contains structured phenomenal parts.
Experience has definite content and temporal borders.
Distinction component adds to total Phi.
Relation component adds to total Phi.
Total irreducibility induces scalar Phi estimate.
Threshold sets conscious decision boundary.
Local maxima over subsets define MICS set membership.
Computed local maxima instantiate exclusion rule.
Power-set search imposes exponential scaling on unfolding.
Von Neumann design induces coarse modular/feedforward topology.
Coarse separability forces Phi toward zero.
Phi sign determines which side of the divide the system occupies.
Boundary implements binary intrinsic/aggregate classification.
Adding recurrent loops increases reciprocal connectivity.
Reciprocity raises minimum partition loss and thus Phi.
Topology defines admissible low-cost partition families.
Transition selectivity contributes distinction terms.
Transition coupling contributes relation terms.
Substrate subsets instantiate distinctions.
Substrate subset interactions instantiate relations.
Identity implies conscious content follows Omega structure.
Consciousness requires crossing intrinsic existence boundary first.

structural_equations.equation: Phi(S, s_0, P) := min_{partition in Partitions(S)} MIP(partition, s_0, P)
MIP := argmin_{partition in Partitions(S)} Loss(partition; s_0, P)
IF topology='grid' THEN Phi in [Phi_high_min, Phi_high_max]; IF 'modular' THEN Phi in [0, Phi_low_max]; IF 'feedforward' THEN Phi in [0, epsilon]
Omega := F(S, s_0, P) with power-set search over 2^|S| subsets
I := {x : Phi(x) = max_{x' subseteq x} Phi(x')}

constraints.expression: Each of the five axioms maps 1:1 to the matching physical postulate.
For overlapping substrates, only maximal-Phi complex exists intrinsically.
Von Neumann digital architectures are coarsely separable and constrained to Phi = 0.

interventions.description: Transform modular network toward recurrent grid-like topology.
Clamp partition to minimum information partition to estimate boundary loss.
Remove units from substrate and recompute irreducibility.

expected_outcomes.conscious: may change depending on threshold crossing

interventions.description: Transform substrate into layered unidirectional architecture.
Transform substrate into recurrent bidirectional lattice.
